name: pandatask
description: Adds a shortcode [task_board board_name="unique_board_id"] to display a task management board.

scripts.zip: npm run build && shx rm -rf release && shx mkdir -p release/pandatask/assets/css release/pandatask/assets/js && shx cp pandatask.php README.txt release/pandatask/ && shx cp -r templates build src release/pandatask/ && shx cp assets/css/pandat69-admin-style.css release/pandatask/assets/css/ && shx cp assets/js/pandat69-admin.js release/pandatask/assets/js/ && cd release && bestzip ../pandatask.zip pandatask/ && cd .. && shx rm -rf release

author: Lukasz Liniewicz
